definitions: To intentionally create or post content (such as an article, video, or social media post) designed to provoke an angry or emotional response from viewers, often to increase engagement or traffic.
To use inflammatory or controversial material to elicit strong negative reactions from an audience.
examples: The influencer decided to ragebait their followers with a controversial opinion.
News outlets sometimes ragebait their readers with sensational headlines.
He was accused of trying to ragebait the comment section.
